name: Lahaina Wildfire, Maui
description: The August 2023 wildfire that destroyed the historic town of Lahaina in hours. Before: lush green hillsides and a coastal town. After: scorched moonscape.
notes: NDVI captures the vegetation loss from the fire. Red = burned areas where green hillsides and trees were incinerated.
what_to_expect: The 'before' image shows a green coastal town with tropical vegetation on the hillsides. The 'after' image is devastation — brown and grey where the town and vegetation were. The NDVI heatmap will be deep red across the entire burn scar. Overture building footprints show the dense residential fabric that was destroyed.

name: Pakistan Mega-Flood, Sindh
description: August 2022 — monsoon flooding submerged a third of Pakistan. The Dadu district in Sindh province became an inland sea overnight.
notes: MNDWI shows the water extent change. Blue = new water where farmland once stood. The signal here is enormous.
what_to_expect: The 'before' image shows green and brown agricultural fields with villages and roads. The 'after' image is shocking — most of the area is underwater, a vast brown-blue inland lake. The MNDWI heatmap will be almost entirely blue (water gain). Overture roads and buildings show what lies beneath the floodwater.

name: Gigafactory Berlin
description: Tesla's Berlin factory in Gruenheide, Germany. Dense pine forest clearcut and replaced with one of Europe's largest EV factories.
notes: NDBI highlights the new impervious surfaces — factory roof, parking lots, access roads carved out of the forest.
what_to_expect: The 'before' image shows unbroken dark green pine forest. The 'after' image reveals a massive grey factory complex with parking lots and roads. The NDBI heatmap lights up red over the factory footprint. Switch to NDVI to see the vegetation loss. Overture has excellent coverage of the new buildings and road network.

name: Black Summer Bushfires, Australia
description: The 2019-2020 Australian bushfire season devastated the Blue Mountains west of Sydney. Millions of hectares of eucalyptus forest burned.
notes: NDVI shows the fire scar — massive vegetation loss across the ridgelines. The contrast between burned and unburned forest is stark.
what_to_expect: The 'before' image shows dense dark green eucalyptus canopy covering rugged terrain. The 'after' image reveals enormous brown-black burn scars cutting across the landscape with pockets of surviving green. The NDVI heatmap will be overwhelmingly red. Overture data is sparse in this wilderness area.

name: Egypt's New Capital
description: Egypt is building an entirely new capital city east of Cairo in the desert. Empty sand dunes are becoming a megacity with skyscrapers, highways, and government districts.
notes: NDBI captures the new built-up area. Red = new construction where empty desert stood. The scale of construction is staggering.
what_to_expect: The 'before' image is featureless tan desert with faint road tracks. The 'after' image is surreal — an entire city grid with highways, massive buildings, and green landscaped areas materialized from nothing. The NDBI heatmap will be deep red across the new urban footprint. Overture building and road data outlines the new city.
